evidence.description: Full unittest suite (79 tests) on the signed work head, run by GitHub Actions.
Re-run the full test suite at the signed head; allowlisted in .agent-receipts/policy.yml.
The v0.2 receipt JSON Schema this receipt itself conforms to.

evidence.claim: SECURITY-MODEL.md and docs/RECEIPTS-GATE.md were written to describe exactly the implemented gate behavior, no more.

judgment_calls: Bootstrap mode: gate passes loudly when the base branch has no trust anchor, so adoption PRs are not bricked; tamper rule still applies once configured.
Inlined ci.yml in this PR: CI was failing repo-wide (public repo calling a private reusable workflow) since before this branch; a trust product cannot ship with broken CI.
Consumed-nonce ledger is check-only in this repo; no bot commits to main (linear-history policy). consume subcommand + docs provided.
v0.2 not yet published to PyPI; AGENTS.md says install from git for v0.2 commands.

request.preview: Implement the v2 core per plan-a2a-trust-v2-2026-07-08: receipt schema v0.2 (request+deliverable binding, typed evidence, key lifecycle, reserved sockets), receipts-gate action with base-branch trust anchor + human-waiver, acceptance policy file, consumed-nonce ledger, honesty docs, CLAUDE.md fix; test everything; dogfood the PR.
request.source: Task message from team lead (CC), 2026-07-08; exact bytes retained by issuer and build agent
